title: THRIFT STORE - 211info
text: ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY THRIFT STORE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a thrift store that sells household goods, books, furniture, toys, clothing, shoes, jewelry, electronics, and various accessories to raise money to benefit animal welfare programs. Donations accepted. 1169 Redwood Avenue Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Friday 9am-4pm, Saturday 9am-2pm Email (541) 955-3367 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 955-3367 Thrift Store Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information. Visit website for acceptable donation items. FEES: Varies by item DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Josephine County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Bus route 10 stops one block away. Located next door to Gooseberries and DaVita. Services: Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Book/Magazine Donation Programs Camping Gear Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Electronics/Small Appliance Donation Programs Furniture/Home Furnishings Donation Programs Kitchenware Donation Programs Sports Equipment Donation Programs Thrift Shops Toy/Game Donation Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY THRIFT STORE
